arts.ttl: Man Utd battle Arsenal as Mathys Tel makes transfer decision
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are both “in contact” with Mathys Tel as they look to complete a late deal for the Bayern Munich forward. The France U21 international has reportedly decided to leave the Allianz Arena before the January transfer window slams shut, and Arsenal and Man Utd are deemed to be the frontrunners in the race for his signature.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's uncovered school note casts emotional light on Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is set to complete a move from Manchester United to Aston Villa on loan for the rest of the season but the deal could be made permanent in the summer

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Arsenal, Red Devils 'both pushing' for Bayern Munich prospect
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal are allegedly both making a sustained effort to sign Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: Team News: One change for Palace, Wharton back in squad
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has made one change to Crystal Palace’s starting XI to face Manchester United at Old Trafford this afternoon, with Daichi Kamada coming into the side.

arts.sum: Crystal Palace are bidding to extend their impressive away run against Manchester United this afternoon (14:00 GMT kick-off) – follow LIVE updates from Old Trafford below!

arts.ttl: Romano announces 'HERE WE GO' on Marcus Rashford transfer
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Barcelona were extremely interested in finalising a move for the 27-year-old, but he is now on the verge of joining Aston Villa on a six-month loan deal. The England forward has been linked with an Old Trafford exit for the entirety of the January transfer window and Villa look set to complete a loan deal amid serious competition from Barcelona and AC Milan.
